title: urobotrya siamensis
intro: Urobotrya siamensis, also known as Thai Urobotrya, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dipterocarpaceae, native to Thailand. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark and leaves, which are used to treat various health conditions. Urobotrya siamensis has been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as to aid in digestion and skin problems. The plant's herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used in traditional Thai medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
